speaker: speaker1
text: Have you adapted to the lifestyle in China ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , almost . But there is one thing .

speaker: speaker2
text: I still wonder what privacy meant for Chinese people . I don't mean to say that there's no privacy in China , but ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Some of my Chinese colleagues just share their personal stories in front of others .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah . we never do that in a public office .

speaker: speaker1
text: Perhaps that's because we hold different ideas about privacy .

speaker: speaker2
text: I have felt that . One day when i was in a queue , reading a newspaper story , the man behind me peered through my shoulder and stared at the newspaper I was holding .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , that's not rare . I've seen people reading at others ' newspaper while taking a metro or a bus .

speaker: speaker2
text: Just stare at the newspaper holding in the hands of the one next to him ?
